overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The vehicle navigates intersections, covered roadways, and commercial districts with heavy neon signage, wet reflective asphalt, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban approach under elevated highway

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at the intersection
traffic light turns green, proceeding forward through intersection

agents.ego_description: driving a black sports car through city streets, approaching and stopping at a red light before proceeding through the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow jeep waiting at the intersection alongside the ego vehicle
red car driving ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: concrete elevated highway structure overhead with support beams
large illuminated billboard with orange neon text reading WICKED AND COME
tall gray concrete wall running along the right side of the road
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under an elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city, driving toward a major intersection. The ego vehicle stops at a red light beneath the glow of a large neon billboard before proceeding through the crosswalk as the light changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban roadway with neon commercial signage

events.description: making a right turn at the intersection onto a new street
entering a covered tunnel section beneath buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and accelerating along the street lined with neon signs before entering a covered roadway

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk next to the concrete wall

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical red neon sign reading softsys
dark opening of covered roadway between buildings
concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting of the covered roadway

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle drives past the prominent softsys neon building and enters a covered tunnel section. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent strips as the road continues beneath the building structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with elevated highways overhead

events.description: exiting the covered tunnel back into open street with visible sky
slight left curve in the road while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: cruising through city streets passing under elevated highway structures and alongside commercial buildings

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpasses crossing above the street
large digital advertising screens on building facades
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into an open commercial district with elevated highways overhead. The street is lined with modern glass buildings, digital billboards, and street-level shops while the camera maintains a steady driving pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with heavy neon signage

events.description: making a sharp right turn at a large intersection
entering the Vista Del Rey district as indicated by on-screen text

agents.ego_description: turning right at a major intersection and continuing through the neon-lit commercial district toward a plaza

notable_agents.action: red truck turning at the intersection alongside the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with NOKIA text on a building facade
large fountain structure visible in the distance at the end of the street
elevated walkway crossing above the street with people visible on it

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a sharp right turn at a major intersection filled with neon signage including a prominent NOKIA sign. The district transitions to Vista Del Rey as the car approaches an open plaza with a central fountain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central fountain monument

events.description: entering the open plaza area with central fountain and statue

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching and entering the plaza area, driving toward the central fountain

entered.detail: monumental statue structure in the center of the plaza
wide open paved area with patterned ground markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide open plaza featuring a central fountain and statue monument. The surroundings transition from dense commercial buildings to an open public space with patterned pavement as the car approaches the fountain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched metropolis that transitions from dense urban underpasses to an expansive open plaza. It begins beneath an elevated highway overpass, pausing at a red light under a glowing billboard before proceeding through a crosswalk and turning right. As the vehicle passes the softsys neon building, the environment shifts into a covered tunnel illuminated by artificial fluorescent strips. The scene then opens back into a commercial district of glass buildings and digital billboards before the camera navigates a sharp right turn past a prominent NOKIA sign. Finally, the dense architecture gives way to the Vista Del Rey district, where the car enters a wide public plaza featuring patterned pavement and a central fountain monument.
